bundle.shortDescription: Code/text editor offline với Monaco engine, multi-caret
bundle.longDescription: TrishType — code/text editor offline dùng Monaco engine (VSCode core). Hỗ trợ multi-caret (Ctrl+Click / Ctrl+D), syntax highlight 50+ ngôn ngữ tự động (.js/.ts/.py/.rs/.md/.json/.html...), tab system, file tree workspace, find/replace với regex, Markdown preview split view, auto-save. 100% offline.
